message:
feat(abi): extract host_resolve module for recursion-free symbol resolution

Extract raw host symbol resolution into a dedicated host_resolve module
that reads /proc/self/maps via raw syscalls, parses in-memory ELF
headers, and resolves glibc symbols directly without triggering
recursive dlsym interposition.

- Add host_resolve.rs module with pub(crate) visibility
- dlfcn_abi: delegate RTLD_NEXT and RTLD_DEFAULT to host_dlsym_raw()
  before fallback logic
- pthread_abi: refactor native_pthread_create() to attempt
  host_pthread_create_raw() first, removing legacy dlopen/dlsym
  fallback for libc.so.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
